creator: dkelly@hiwaay.net
text:
On Tue, Dec 16, 2008 at 04:32:32PM +0100, Stefan Walter wrote:
> Hi David (2x),
> 
> in the meantime, audio/streamripper has been updated to a newer
> version, Can you still reproduce the problem you described with an
> up-to-date system?

Yes, thanks for the prompt! I discovered a couple of weeks ago that the
latest fixed the problem but fumbled around trying to figure out how to
update the PR from other than my original machine.

audio/streamripper now works as expected in extracting song titles from
the stream. I recommend closing this PR as "fixed".

-- 
David Kelly N4HHE, dkelly@HiWAAY.net
========================================================================
Whom computers would destroy, they must first drive mad.
